zh: 新增 30、60、90、120 FPS 宠物动画帧率选项，默认使用 90 FPS
串行处理鼠标穿透状态，减少原生窗口状态竞争
增加拖动结束冷却时间，改善屏幕边缘收起和拖出时的稳定性
补充原生崩溃诊断日志
en: Added selectable 30, 60, 90, and 120 FPS pet motion with 90 FPS as the default
Serialized mouse-passthrough updates to prevent native window state races
Added a post-drag cooldown for more reliable edge tuck and pull-out behavior
